core_mechanism: A one-parameter (Hopf-algebra / quantum-group) deformation of a symmetry Lie algebra together with a deformed co-product, so that the generators acting on a composite of two objects no longer combine additively and this deformed composition law fixes the admissible interaction between the objects, with irreducible representations of the deformed generators supplying the single-object state space.
brief_reason: The abstract's method is built on characterizing a deformed Poincare/Galilei symmetry algebra, constructing an irreducible representation of the deformed generators for one particle, and finding that the two-particle symmetry generators' structure is intimately connected with the deformation of the interaction law.
